---
title: "ICEMAN Assessment Tool"
subtitle: "Interactive forms for RCTs and meta-analyses — Version 1.1"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
.tab-btns { display:flex; gap:8px; margin-bottom:1.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.tab-btn {
  padding:8px 20px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid #ced4da;
  background:transparent; cursor:pointer; font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:500;
  transition:all 0.15s;
}
.tab-btn.active { background:#185FA5; color:#fff; border-color:#185FA5; }
.tab-pane { display:none; }
.tab-pane.active { display:block; }

.iceman-item {
  border:1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius:10px;
  padding:1.25rem 1.25rem 1rem; margin-bottom:1.25rem; background:#fff;
}
.item-num {
  font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:700; color:#185FA5;
  text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.2rem;
}
.item-q { font-weight:600; font-size:1rem; margin-bottom:0.3rem; }
.item-hint { font-size:0.84rem; color:#666; margin-bottom:1rem; line-height:1.5; }
.manual-link {
  font-size:0.72rem; color:#185FA5; text-decoration:none;
  border:1px solid #185FA5; border-radius:4px; padding:1px 7px; margin-left:8px;
}
.manual-link:hover { background:#e6f1fb; }

.radio-row {
  display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:10px;
  padding:8px 10px; border-radius:7px; cursor:pointer;
  border:1px solid transparent; margin-bottom:4px; transition:all 0.1s;
}
.radio-row:hover { background:#f0f4f8; border-color:#b8d0e8; }
.radio-row.selected { background:#e6f1fb; border-color:#185FA5; }
.radio-row input[type=radio] { margin-top:3px; flex-shrink:0; }
.rl { font-weight:600; font-size:0.9rem; }
.rd { font-size:0.82rem; color:#666; }

.cred-wrap { position:relative; margin:0.75rem 0 0.25rem; }
.cred-bar {
  height:10px; border-radius:5px;
  background:linear-gradient(to right,#E24B4A,#FAC775,#1D9E75,#0F6E56);
}
.cred-labels {
  display:flex; justify-content:space-between;
  font-size:0.7rem; color:#888; margin-top:3px;
}
.cred-thumb {
  position:absolute; top:5px; width:18px; height:18px;
  border-radius:50%; background:#fff; border:2px solid #333;
  transform:translateX(-50%); pointer-events:none; transition:left 0.05s;
}
input.cred-slider {
  width:100%; position:relative; z-index:2;
  opacity:0; cursor:pointer; height:24px; margin-top:-17px; display:block;
}
.scale-interp { text-align:center; font-size:0.82rem; color:#555; margin-top:0.4rem; }

textarea.comment-box {
  width:100%; margin-top:10px; font-size:0.84rem;
  padding:7px 10px; border-radius:7px; border:1px solid #dee2e6;
  resize:vertical; min-height:48px; background:#f8f9fa;
}

.result-section {
  border:1px solid #dee2e6; border-radius:10px;
  padding:1.5rem; margin-top:1.5rem; background:#fff;
}
.result-row {
  display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
  padding:6px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #f0f0f0; font-size:0.875rem;
}
.result-row:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
.b-low  { background:#FDEAEA; color:#C03535; font-size:0.73rem; padding:2px 10px; border-radius:6px; white-space:nowrap; }
.b-ok   { background:#FEF5E0; color:#9A6C00; font-size:0.73rem; padding:2px 10px; border-radius:6px; white-space:nowrap; }
.b-good { background:#E0F5EE; color:#148055; font-size:0.73rem; padding:2px 10px; border-radius:6px; white-space:nowrap; }
.b-high { background:#D4EDE3; color:#0A5C3C; font-size:0.73rem; padding:2px 10px; border-radius:6px; white-space:nowrap; }
.b-na   { background:#f0f0f0; color:#666;    font-size:0.73rem; padding:2px 10px; border-radius:6px; white-space:nowrap; }

.verdict-box {
  text-align:center; padding:1.5rem; margin-top:1rem;
  border-radius:8px; background:#f8f9fa; border:1px solid #dee2e6;
}
.verdict-label { font-size:1.3rem; font-weight:700; }
.verdict-sub   { font-size:0.88rem; color:#555; margin-top:5px; }

.live-summary {
  border:1px solid #c5d8ef; border-radius:10px;
  padding:1.25rem; margin-bottom:1.25rem; background:#f4f8fd;
}
.live-summary-title {
  font-size:0.72rem; font-weight:700; color:#185FA5;
  text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.75rem;
}
.summary-row {
  display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:flex-start;
  padding:5px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #dde8f5; gap:12px; font-size:0.875rem;
}
.summary-row:last-child { border-bottom:none; }
.s-label { color:#333; flex:1; }
.s-comment { font-size:0.78rem; color:#777; margin-top:2px; font-style:italic; }

.prelim-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px; margin-bottom:1rem; }
@media(max-width:600px){ .prelim-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; } }
.fgroup { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:4px; }
.fgroup label { font-size:0.82rem; color:#555; font-weight:600; }
.fgroup input, .fgroup select, .fgroup textarea {
  font-size:0.9rem; padding:6px 10px; border-radius:7px;
  border:1px solid #dee2e6; background:#f8f9fa; color:inherit; width:100%;
}
.action-row { display:flex; gap:10px; margin-top:1.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.btn-tool { padding:9px 20px; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid #ced4da; cursor:pointer; font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:500; background:#fff; }
.btn-tool.primary { background:#185FA5; color:#fff; border-color:#185FA5; }
.btn-tool.primary:hover { background:#0d4a80; }
.btn-tool:hover { background:#f0f4f8; }
.stopped-msg { background:#fff3cd; border:1px solid #ffc107; border-radius:8px; padding:1rem 1.25rem; margin-top:1rem; font-size:0.9rem; }
</style>

<div style="background:#f0f5fb;border-left:4px solid #185FA5;border-radius:6px;padding:1rem 1.25rem;margin-bottom:1.5rem;font-size:0.875rem;">
  <strong>Important instructions — Version 1.1</strong>
  <ul style="margin:0.5rem 0 0;padding-left:1.25rem;line-height:1.75;">
    <li>Complete a <strong>separate</strong> credibility assessment for each effect modifier, outcome, time-point, and effect measure.</li>
    <li><strong>Do not apply ICEMAN if the interaction p-value is 0.1 or larger</strong> — ICEMAN addresses possible claims of effect modification, not claims of no effect modification.</li>
    <li>Response options on the <strong>left</strong> indicate reduced credibility; options on the <strong>right</strong> indicate increased credibility.</li>
    <li>"Completely unclear" should be interpreted as probably reduced credibility.</li>
    <li>Provide a supporting comment under each question for transparency.</li>
    <li>Provide a copy of the completed form in the supplement of your article.</li>
  </ul>
</div>

Select the study type to begin:

<div class="tab-btns">
  <button class="tab-btn active" onclick="switchTab('rct',this)">Randomized controlled trial (RCT)</button>
  <button class="tab-btn" onclick="switchTab('meta',this)">Meta-analysis / Systematic review</button>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════ RCT TAB ══════════════════════ -->
<div id="tab-rct" class="tab-pane active">

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Preliminary considerations</div>
  <div class="fgroup" style="margin-bottom:0.75rem">
    <label>Effect modifier</label>
    <input type="text" id="r-mod" placeholder="e.g. age, disease severity, dose">
  </div>
  <div class="fgroup" style="max-width:380px;margin-bottom:0.75rem">
    <label>Effect modifier measured before or at randomization?</label>
    <select id="r-prerando" onchange="showRCTItems()">
      <option value="">Select…</option>
      <option value="yes">Yes — continue</option>
      <option value="no">No — stop here</option>
    </select>
  </div>
  <div class="prelim-grid">
    <div class="fgroup"><label>Outcome and time-point</label><input type="text" id="r-outcome" placeholder="e.g. mortality at 1 year"></div>
    <div class="fgroup"><label>Effect measure</label><input type="text" id="r-measure" placeholder="e.g. relative risk"></div>
    <div class="fgroup"><label>Study reference</label><input type="text" id="r-ref" placeholder="Author, journal, year…"></div>
    <div class="fgroup"><label>Protocol reference (if available)</label><input type="text" id="r-proto" placeholder="ClinicalTrials.gov, URL…"></div>
  </div>
  <div id="r-stopped" class="stopped-msg" style="display:none">
    ⚠️ ICEMAN does not apply when the effect modifier was measured after randomization (e.g. an intermediate outcome). Consult the manual for exceptions and alternative methods. <a href="manual/index.qmd" class="manual-link">Manual ↗</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="r-items" style="display:none">

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 1 of 6</div>
  <div class="item-q">Was the direction of effect modification correctly hypothesized a priori? <a href="manual/rct.qmd#rct-item1" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div class="item-hint">Credibility is higher if investigators correctly anticipated the direction, lower if they failed to anticipate a direction, and lowest if they anticipated the opposite direction.</div>
  <div id="r-q1">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q1" value="0"><span><span class="rl">Definitely no</span><br><span class="rd">Clearly post-hoc, results inconsistent with hypothesized direction, or biologically very implausible</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q1" value="1"><span><span class="rl">Probably no or unclear</span><br><span class="rd">Vague hypothesis or hypothesized direction unclear</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q1" value="2"><span><span class="rl">Probably yes</span><br><span class="rd">No protocol but unequivocal statement of a priori hypothesis with correct direction</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q1" value="3"><span><span class="rl">Definitely yes</span><br><span class="rd">Prior protocol with correct specification of direction based on biologic rationale</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="r-q1c" placeholder="Comment (optional)…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 2 of 6</div>
  <div class="item-q">Was the effect modification supported by prior evidence? <a href="manual/rct.qmd#rct-item2" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div class="item-hint">Credibility is higher if the effect modification is supported by prior direct or indirect evidence, lower if observed for the first time, lowest if inconsistent with prior evidence.</div>
  <div id="r-q2">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q2" value="0"><span><span class="rl">Inconsistent with prior evidence</span><br><span class="rd">Prior evidence suggested a different direction of effect modification</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q2" value="1"><span><span class="rl">Little or no support or unclear</span><br><span class="rd">No prior evidence, or consistent with weak/very indirect evidence, or unclear</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q2" value="2"><span><span class="rl">Some support</span><br><span class="rd">Consistent with more limited or indirect prior evidence</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q2" value="3"><span><span class="rl">Strong support</span><br><span class="rd">Consistent with strong prior evidence directly applicable to the clinical scenario</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="r-q2c" placeholder="Comment (optional)…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 3 of 6</div>
  <div class="item-q">Does a test for interaction suggest that chance is an unlikely explanation of the apparent effect modification? <small style="font-weight:400;color:#666">(consider irrespective of number of effect modifiers)</small> <a href="manual/rct.qmd#rct-item3" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div class="item-hint">Consider the interaction p-value as reported. Note: showing significance in one subgroup and not another does not indicate whether chance explains differences across subgroups.</div>
  <div id="r-q3">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q3" value="0"><span><span class="rl">Chance a very likely explanation</span><br><span class="rd">Interaction p-value &gt; 0.05</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q3" value="1"><span><span class="rl">Chance a likely explanation or unclear</span><br><span class="rd">p ≤ 0.05 and &gt; 0.01, or no test reported and not computable</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q3" value="2"><span><span class="rl">Chance may not explain</span><br><span class="rd">p ≤ 0.01 and &gt; 0.005</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q3" value="3"><span><span class="rl">Chance an unlikely explanation</span><br><span class="rd">p ≤ 0.005</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="r-q3c" placeholder="Comment (optional)…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 4 of 6</div>
  <div class="item-q">Did the authors test only a small number of effect modifiers, or consider multiplicity? <a href="manual/rct.qmd#rct-item4" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div class="item-hint">Credibility is higher if investigators tested only a small number of effect modifiers, or statistically adjusted for multiplicity.</div>
  <div id="r-q4">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q4" value="0"><span><span class="rl">Definitely no</span><br><span class="rd">Explicitly exploratory or &gt;10 modifiers tested; multiplicity not considered</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q4" value="1"><span><span class="rl">Probably no or unclear</span><br><span class="rd">No mention of number, or 4–10 modifiers tested; not considered</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q4" value="2"><span><span class="rl">Probably yes</span><br><span class="rd">No protocol but unequivocal statement of ≤3 modifiers tested</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q4" value="3"><span><span class="rl">Definitely yes</span><br><span class="rd">Protocol with ≤3 modifiers, or multiplicity considered in analysis</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="r-q4c" placeholder="Comment (optional)…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 5 of 6 — only if effect modifier is continuous</div>
  <div class="item-q">Were arbitrary cut points avoided? <a href="manual/rct.qmd#rct-item5" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div class="item-hint">Analyses using the full spectrum of values are most credible. Data-driven cut points maximising the interaction are associated with high false-positive rates.</div>
  <div id="r-q5">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q5" value="na"><span><span class="rl">Not applicable — effect modifier is not continuous</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q5" value="0"><span><span class="rl">Definitely no</span><br><span class="rd">Analysis based on exploratory cut point (e.g. maximising interaction p-value)</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q5" value="1"><span><span class="rl">Probably no or unclear</span><br><span class="rd">Analysis based on cut point(s) of unclear origin</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q5" value="2"><span><span class="rl">Probably yes</span><br><span class="rd">Analysis based on pre-specified cut points (e.g. from prior RCT)</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q5" value="3"><span><span class="rl">Definitely yes</span><br><span class="rd">Analysis based on full continuum (linear/logarithmic relationship)</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="r-q5c" placeholder="Comment (optional)…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 6 — optional</div>
  <div class="item-q">Are there additional considerations that may increase or decrease credibility? <a href="manual/rct.qmd#rct-item6" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div class="item-hint">Consider: sensitivity analyses, dose-response pattern, persistence after adjustment, power, consistency across related outcomes, risk of bias.</div>
  <div id="r-q6">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q6" value="dec"><span><span class="rl">Yes — probably decrease credibility</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="r-q6" value="inc"><span><span class="rl">Yes — probably increase credibility</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="r-q6c" placeholder="Describe considerations…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="live-summary" id="r-live-summary">
  <div class="live-summary-title">Summary of responses</div>
  <div class="s-label" style="color:#888;font-size:0.84rem;">— Fill in the items above to see a summary —</div>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 7 — overall rating</div>
  <div class="item-q">How would you rate the overall credibility of the proposed effect modification? <a href="manual/rct.qmd#rct-item7" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div class="item-hint">The overall rating should be driven by items that <em>decrease</em> credibility. Place a mark on the continuous scale below.</div>
  <div class="cred-wrap">
    <div class="cred-bar">
      <div class="cred-thumb" id="r-thumb" style="left:50%"></div>
    </div>
    <input type="range" min="0" max="100" value="50" class="cred-slider" id="r-scale" oninput="moveThumb('r')">
    <div class="cred-labels"><span>Very low</span><span>Low</span><span>Moderate</span><span>High</span></div>
    <div class="scale-interp" id="r-interp">Likely no effect modification — use overall estimate but note remaining uncertainty</div>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="r-overallc" placeholder="Justify your overall rating…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="action-row">
  <button class="btn-tool primary" onclick="printReport('r')">Print / save as PDF</button>
  <button class="btn-tool" onclick="resetForm('r')">Reset form</button>
</div>
<div id="r-report"></div>

</div><!-- end r-items -->
</div><!-- end tab-rct -->

<!-- ══════════════════════ META TAB ══════════════════════ -->
<div id="tab-meta" class="tab-pane">

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Preliminary considerations</div>
  <div class="fgroup" style="margin-bottom:0.75rem">
    <label>Effect modifier</label>
    <input type="text" id="m-mod" placeholder="e.g. tumour stage, age, risk of bias">
  </div>
  <div class="fgroup" style="max-width:380px;margin-bottom:0.75rem">
    <label>Effect modifier measured before or at randomization?</label>
    <select id="m-prerando" onchange="showMetaItems()">
      <option value="">Select…</option>
      <option value="yes">Yes — continue</option>
      <option value="no">No — stop here</option>
    </select>
  </div>
  <div class="prelim-grid">
    <div class="fgroup"><label>Outcome and time-point</label><input type="text" id="m-outcome" placeholder="e.g. mortality at 1 year"></div>
    <div class="fgroup"><label>Effect measure</label><input type="text" id="m-measure" placeholder="e.g. hazard ratio"></div>
    <div class="fgroup"><label>Study reference</label><input type="text" id="m-ref" placeholder="Author, journal, year…"></div>
    <div class="fgroup"><label>Protocol reference (if available)</label><input type="text" id="m-proto" placeholder="PROSPERO ID or URL…"></div>
  </div>
  <div id="m-stopped" class="stopped-msg" style="display:none">
    ⚠️ ICEMAN does not apply when the effect modifier was measured after randomization. Consult the manual for exceptions. <a href="manual/index.qmd" class="manual-link">Manual ↗</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="m-items" style="display:none">

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 1 of 10</div>
  <div class="item-q">Is the effect modification based on comparison within rather than between RCTs? <a href="manual/meta.qmd#meta-item1" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div class="item-hint">Between-study comparisons are usually much less credible due to study-level confounding.</div>
  <div id="m-q1">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q1" value="0"><span><span class="rl">Completely between</span><br><span class="rd">Subgroup analysis or meta-regression comparing overall effects of each individual trial</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q1" value="1"><span><span class="rl">Mostly between or unclear</span><br><span class="rd">Most information from overall effects; some trials provide within-trial subgroup information</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q1" value="2"><span><span class="rl">Mostly within</span><br><span class="rd">Most trials provide within-trial subgroup information; or IPD combining within and between</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q1" value="3"><span><span class="rl">Completely within</span><br><span class="rd">IPD analysis separating within from between trial information (e.g. meta-analysis of interactions)</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="m-q1c" placeholder="Comment (optional)…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 2 of 10</div>
  <div class="item-q">If ≥2 within-trial comparisons available: is the effect modification similar from trial to trial? <a href="manual/meta.qmd#meta-item2" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div id="m-q2">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q2" value="na"><span><span class="rl">Not applicable — no or one within-RCT comparison</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q2" value="0"><span><span class="rl">Definitely not similar</span><br><span class="rd">Reported for ≥2 trials with clearly different directions</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q2" value="1"><span><span class="rl">Probably not similar or unclear</span><br><span class="rd">Not reported for individual trials, or too imprecise to tell</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q2" value="2"><span><span class="rl">Mostly similar</span><br><span class="rd">Reported for ≥2 trials, mostly similar direction, considerable differences in magnitude</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q2" value="3"><span><span class="rl">Definitely similar</span><br><span class="rd">Reported for ≥2 trials, similar direction, only some differences in magnitude</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="m-q2c" placeholder="Comment (optional)…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 3 of 10 — for between-RCT comparisons</div>
  <div class="item-q">Is the number of studies large? <a href="manual/meta.qmd#meta-item3" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div id="m-q3">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q3" value="na"><span><span class="rl">Not applicable — no between-RCT comparison</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q3" value="0"><span><span class="rl">Very small</span><br><span class="rd">1–2 in smallest subgroup; ≤5 in continuous meta-regression</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q3" value="1"><span><span class="rl">Rather small or unclear</span><br><span class="rd">3–4 in smallest subgroup; 6–10 in continuous meta-regression</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q3" value="2"><span><span class="rl">Rather large</span><br><span class="rd">5–9 in smallest subgroup; 11–15 in continuous meta-regression</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q3" value="3"><span><span class="rl">Large</span><br><span class="rd">≥10 in smallest subgroup; &gt;15 in continuous meta-regression</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="m-q3c" placeholder="Comment (optional)…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 4 of 10</div>
  <div class="item-q">Was the direction of effect modification correctly hypothesized a priori? <a href="manual/rct.qmd#rct-item1" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div class="item-hint">Because meta-analyses are retrospective, investigators may already know key trials and promising effect modifiers.</div>
  <div id="m-q4">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q4" value="0"><span><span class="rl">Definitely no</span><br><span class="rd">Clearly post-hoc, inconsistent with hypothesized direction, or biologically very implausible</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q4" value="1"><span><span class="rl">Probably no or unclear</span><br><span class="rd">Vague hypothesis or direction unclear</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q4" value="2"><span><span class="rl">Probably yes</span><br><span class="rd">No protocol but unequivocal a priori statement with correct direction</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q4" value="3"><span><span class="rl">Definitely yes</span><br><span class="rd">Prior protocol with correct direction based on biologic rationale</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="m-q4c" placeholder="Comment (optional)…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 5 of 10</div>
  <div class="item-q">Does a test for interaction suggest that chance is an unlikely explanation of the apparent effect modification? <small style="font-weight:400;color:#666">(consider irrespective of number of effect modifiers)</small> <a href="manual/rct.qmd#rct-item3" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div id="m-q5">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q5" value="0"><span><span class="rl">Chance a very likely explanation</span><br><span class="rd">Interaction/meta-regression p-value &gt; 0.05</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q5" value="1"><span><span class="rl">Chance a likely explanation or unclear</span><br><span class="rd">p ≤ 0.05 and &gt; 0.01, or no test available</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q5" value="2"><span><span class="rl">Chance may not explain</span><br><span class="rd">p ≤ 0.01 and &gt; 0.005</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q5" value="3"><span><span class="rl">Chance an unlikely explanation</span><br><span class="rd">p ≤ 0.005</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="m-q5c" placeholder="Comment (optional)…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 6 of 10</div>
  <div class="item-q">Did the authors test only a small number of effect modifiers, or consider multiplicity? <a href="manual/rct.qmd#rct-item4" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div id="m-q6">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q6" value="0"><span><span class="rl">Definitely no</span><br><span class="rd">Explicitly exploratory or &gt;10 modifiers; multiplicity not considered</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q6" value="1"><span><span class="rl">Probably no or unclear</span><br><span class="rd">No mention of number, or 4–10 modifiers; not considered</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q6" value="2"><span><span class="rl">Probably yes</span><br><span class="rd">No protocol but unequivocal statement of ≤3 modifiers</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q6" value="3"><span><span class="rl">Definitely yes</span><br><span class="rd">Protocol with ≤3 modifiers, or multiplicity considered in analysis</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="m-q6c" placeholder="Comment (optional)…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 7 of 10</div>
  <div class="item-q">Did the authors use a random effects model? <a href="manual/meta.qmd#meta-item7" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div class="item-hint">Credibility is higher if a random effects model was used within subgroups. Fixed effect models increase the risk of false-positive claims.</div>
  <div id="m-q7">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q7" value="0"><span><span class="rl">Definitely no</span><br><span class="rd">Fixed (or common) effect model explicitly stated</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q7" value="1"><span><span class="rl">Probably no or unclear</span><br><span class="rd">Probably no random effects model, or unclear</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q7" value="2"><span><span class="rl">Probably yes</span><br><span class="rd">Probably random (or mixed) effects model</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q7" value="3"><span><span class="rl">Definitely yes</span><br><span class="rd">Random (or mixed) effects model explicitly stated</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="m-q7c" placeholder="Comment (optional)…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 8 of 10 — only if effect modifier is continuous</div>
  <div class="item-q">Were arbitrary cut points avoided? <a href="manual/meta.qmd#meta-item8" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div id="m-q8">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q8" value="na"><span><span class="rl">Not applicable — effect modifier is not continuous</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q8" value="0"><span><span class="rl">Definitely no</span><br><span class="rd">Analysis based on exploratory cut point</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q8" value="1"><span><span class="rl">Probably no</span><br><span class="rd">Analysis based on cut point(s) of unclear origin</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q8" value="2"><span><span class="rl">Probably yes</span><br><span class="rd">Analysis based on pre-specified cut points</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q8" value="3"><span><span class="rl">Definitely yes</span><br><span class="rd">Analysis based on full continuum</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="m-q8c" placeholder="Comment (optional)…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 9 of 10 — optional</div>
  <div class="item-q">Are there additional considerations? <a href="manual/meta.qmd#meta-item9" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div id="m-q9">
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q9" value="na"><span><span class="rl">Not applicable</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q9" value="dec"><span><span class="rl">Yes — probably decrease credibility</span></span></label>
    <label class="radio-row"><input type="radio" name="m-q9" value="inc"><span><span class="rl">Yes — probably increase credibility</span></span></label>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="m-q9c" placeholder="Describe considerations…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="live-summary" id="m-live-summary">
  <div class="live-summary-title">Summary of responses</div>
  <div class="s-label" style="color:#888;font-size:0.84rem;">— Fill in the items above to see a summary —</div>
</div>

<div class="iceman-item">
  <div class="item-num">Item 10 of 10 — overall rating</div>
  <div class="item-q">How would you rate the overall credibility? <a href="manual/meta.qmd#meta-item10" class="manual-link" target="_blank">Manual ↗</a></div>
  <div class="item-hint">The overall rating should be driven by items that decrease credibility.</div>
  <div class="cred-wrap">
    <div class="cred-bar">
      <div class="cred-thumb" id="m-thumb" style="left:50%"></div>
    </div>
    <input type="range" min="0" max="100" value="50" class="cred-slider" id="m-scale" oninput="moveThumb('m')">
    <div class="cred-labels"><span>Very low</span><span>Low</span><span>Moderate</span><span>High</span></div>
    <div class="scale-interp" id="m-interp">Likely no effect modification — use overall estimate but note remaining uncertainty</div>
  </div>
  <textarea class="comment-box" id="m-overallc" placeholder="Justify your overall rating…"></textarea>
</div>

<div class="action-row">
  <button class="btn-tool primary" onclick="printReport('m')">Print / save as PDF</button>
  <button class="btn-tool" onclick="resetForm('m')">Reset form</button>
</div>
<div id="m-report"></div>

</div><!-- end m-items -->
</div><!-- end tab-meta -->

<script>
function switchTab(t, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab-pane').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('tab-' + t).classList.add('active');
  btn.classList.add('active');
}

function showRCTItems() {
  const v = document.getElementById('r-prerando').value;
  document.getElementById('r-items').style.display = v === 'yes' ? 'block' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('r-stopped').style.display = v === 'no' ? 'block' : 'none';
  if (v === 'yes') updateLiveSummary('r');
}
function showMetaItems() {
  const v = document.getElementById('m-prerando').value;
  document.getElementById('m-items').style.display = v === 'yes' ? 'block' : 'none';
  document.getElementById('m-stopped').style.display = v === 'no' ? 'block' : 'none';
  if (v === 'yes') updateLiveSummary('m');
}

document.addEventListener('click', e => {
  const row = e.target.closest('.radio-row');
  if (!row) return;
  const input = row.querySelector('input[type=radio]');
  if (!input) return;
  const name = input.name;
  document.querySelectorAll(`input[name="${name}"]`).forEach(i => {
    i.closest('.radio-row').classList.remove('selected');
  });
  row.classList.add('selected');
  input.checked = true;
  if (name.startsWith('r-')) updateLiveSummary('r');
  else if (name.startsWith('m-')) updateLiveSummary('m');
});

document.addEventListener('input', e => {
  if (e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') {
    const id = e.target.id || '';
    if (id.startsWith('r-') && id !== 'r-overallc') updateLiveSummary('r');
    if (id.startsWith('m-') && id !== 'm-overallc') updateLiveSummary('m');
  }
});

const interpLabels = [
  'Minimal to no support for effect modification — use overall effect for each subgroup',
  'Some but insufficient support for effect modification — use overall effect for each subgroup but note remaining uncertainty',
  'Likely effect modification — use separate effects for each subgroup but note remaining uncertainty',
  'Very likely effect modification — use separate effects for each subgroup'
];
function moveThumb(p) {
  const val = +document.getElementById(p + '-scale').value;
  document.getElementById(p + '-thumb').style.left = val + '%';
  const idx = val < 25 ? 0 : val < 50 ? 1 : val < 75 ? 2 : 3;
  document.getElementById(p + '-interp').textContent = interpLabels[idx];
}

function getVal(name) {
  const el = document.querySelector(`input[name="${name}"]:checked`);
  return el ? el.value : null;
}
function badge(v) {
  if (v === null) return ['Not answered', 'b-na'];
  if (v === 'na' || v === 'none') return ['N/A', 'b-na'];
  if (v === 'inc') return ['Probably increases credibility', 'b-good'];
  if (v === 'dec') return ['Probably decreases credibility', 'b-low'];
  const n = parseInt(v);
  if (n === 0) return ['Definitely no / lowest credibility', 'b-low'];
  if (n === 1) return ['Probably no or unclear', 'b-low'];
  if (n === 2) return ['Probably yes / supported', 'b-ok'];
  if (n === 3) return ['Definitely yes / highest credibility', 'b-good'];
  return [v, 'b-na'];
}
function verdictFromScale(val) {
  if (val < 25) return { label: 'Very low credibility', sub: 'Minimal to no support for effect modification — use overall effect for each subgroup', color: '#A32D2D' };
  if (val < 50) return { label: 'Low credibility', sub: 'Some but insufficient support for effect modification — use overall effect for each subgroup but note remaining uncertainty', color: '#854F0B' };
  if (val < 75) return { label: 'Moderate credibility', sub: 'Likely effect modification — use separate effects for each subgroup but note remaining uncertainty', color: '#3B6D11' };
  return { label: 'High credibility', sub: 'Very likely effect modification — use separate effects for each subgroup', color: '#0F6E56' };
}
function escapeHtml(value) {
  return String(value).replace(/[&<>"']/g, ch => ({
    '&': '&amp;',
    '<': '&lt;',
    '>': '&gt;',
    '"': '&quot;',
    "'": '&#39;'
  }[ch]));
}

function buildRows(items) {
  return items.map(item => {
    const [txt, cls] = badge(item.val);
    const comment = item.comment ? `<div style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#666;padding:3px 0 6px;">${escapeHtml(item.comment)}</div>` : '';
    return `<div class="result-row"><span>${item.label}</span><span class="${cls}">${txt}</span></div>${comment}`;
  }).join('');
}

function genReport(p) {
  const isRct = p === 'r';
  const scaleVal = +document.getElementById(p + '-scale').value;
  const verdict = verdictFromScale(scaleVal);
  const ref = document.getElementById(p + '-ref').value;
  const outcome = document.getElementById(p + '-outcome').value;
  const mod = document.getElementById(p + '-mod').value;
  const overallComment = document.getElementById(p + '-overallc').value;

  let items;
  if (isRct) {
    items = [
      { label: '1. Direction hypothesized a priori', val: getVal('r-q1'), comment: document.getElementById('r-q1c').value },
      { label: '2. Supported by prior evidence', val: getVal('r-q2'), comment: document.getElementById('r-q2c').value },
      { label: '3. Interaction test — chance unlikely', val: getVal('r-q3'), comment: document.getElementById('r-q3c').value },
      { label: '4. Small number of modifiers tested', val: getVal('r-q4'), comment: document.getElementById('r-q4c').value },
      { label: '5. Arbitrary cut points avoided', val: getVal('r-q5'), comment: document.getElementById('r-q5c').value },
      { label: '6. Additional considerations (optional)', val: getVal('r-q6'), comment: document.getElementById('r-q6c').value },
    ];
  } else {
    items = [
      { label: '1. Within vs between comparison', val: getVal('m-q1'), comment: document.getElementById('m-q1c').value },
      { label: '2. Similar across trials', val: getVal('m-q2'), comment: document.getElementById('m-q2c').value },
      { label: '3. Number of studies (between)', val: getVal('m-q3'), comment: document.getElementById('m-q3c').value },
      { label: '4. Direction a priori', val: getVal('m-q4'), comment: document.getElementById('m-q4c').value },
      { label: '5. Interaction test — chance unlikely', val: getVal('m-q5'), comment: document.getElementById('m-q5c').value },
      { label: '6. Small number of modifiers', val: getVal('m-q6'), comment: document.getElementById('m-q6c').value },
      { label: '7. Random effects model', val: getVal('m-q7'), comment: document.getElementById('m-q7c').value },
      { label: '8. Arbitrary cut points avoided', val: getVal('m-q8'), comment: document.getElementById('m-q8c').value },
      { label: '9. Additional considerations (optional)', val: getVal('m-q9'), comment: document.getElementById('m-q9c').value },
    ];
  }

  const meta = [ref, outcome ? 'Outcome: ' + outcome : '', mod ? 'Effect modifier: ' + mod : ''].filter(Boolean).join(' | ');
  const safeMeta = escapeHtml(meta);
  const safeOverallComment = escapeHtml(overallComment);
  const html = `
  <div class="result-section" id="${p}-report-content">
    <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:1.05rem;margin-bottom:0.25rem">ICEMAN Assessment Report</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#888;margin-bottom:1rem;">${isRct ? 'Randomized controlled trial' : 'Meta-analysis / Systematic review'} · ${new Date().toLocaleDateString()}</div>
    ${safeMeta ? `<div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:#555;margin-bottom:1rem;padding:6px 10px;background:#f8f9fa;border-radius:6px;">${safeMeta}</div>` : ''}
    ${buildRows(items)}
    <div class="verdict-box">
      <div class="verdict-label" style="color:${verdict.color}">${verdict.label}</div>
      <div class="verdict-sub">${verdict.sub}</div>
      ${safeOverallComment ? `<div style="font-size:0.84rem;margin-top:0.75rem;text-align:left;border-top:1px solid #dee2e6;padding-top:0.75rem;"><strong>Comment:</strong> ${safeOverallComment}</div>` : ''}
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:#aaa;margin-top:1rem;">Generated with ICEMAN web tool · Version 1.1 · Schandelmaier et al. CMAJ 2020;192:E901–E906</div>
  </div>`;
  document.getElementById(p + '-report').innerHTML = html;
  document.getElementById(p + '-report').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
}

function printReport(p) {
  genReport(p);
  setTimeout(() => window.print(), 300);
}

function updateLiveSummary(p) {
  const isRct = p === 'r';
  const defs = isRct ? [
    { name:'r-q1', label:'1. Direction a priori',       cid:'r-q1c' },
    { name:'r-q2', label:'2. Prior evidence',           cid:'r-q2c' },
    { name:'r-q3', label:'3. Interaction test',         cid:'r-q3c' },
    { name:'r-q4', label:'4. Multiplicity',             cid:'r-q4c' },
    { name:'r-q5', label:'5. Cut points',               cid:'r-q5c' },
    { name:'r-q6', label:'6. Additional (optional)',    cid:'r-q6c' },
  ] : [
    { name:'m-q1', label:'1. Within vs between',        cid:'m-q1c' },
    { name:'m-q2', label:'2. Similar across trials',    cid:'m-q2c' },
    { name:'m-q3', label:'3. Number of studies',        cid:'m-q3c' },
    { name:'m-q4', label:'4. Direction a priori',       cid:'m-q4c' },
    { name:'m-q5', label:'5. Interaction test',         cid:'m-q5c' },
    { name:'m-q6', label:'6. Multiplicity',             cid:'m-q6c' },
    { name:'m-q7', label:'7. Random effects model',     cid:'m-q7c' },
    { name:'m-q8', label:'8. Cut points',               cid:'m-q8c' },
    { name:'m-q9', label:'9. Additional (optional)',    cid:'m-q9c' },
  ];
  const rows = defs.map(d => {
    const [txt, cls] = badge(getVal(d.name));
    const comment = document.getElementById(d.cid).value.trim();
    const commentHtml = comment ? `<div class="s-comment">${comment}</div>` : '';
    return `<div class="summary-row"><div><div class="s-label">${d.label}</div>${commentHtml}</div><span class="${cls}">${txt}</span></div>`;
  }).join('');
  document.getElementById(p + '-live-summary').innerHTML =
    `<div class="live-summary-title">Summary of responses</div>${rows}`;
}

function resetForm(p) {
  document.querySelectorAll(`input[name^="${p}-"]`).forEach(i => {
    i.checked = false;
    i.closest && i.closest('.radio-row') && i.closest('.radio-row').classList.remove('selected');
  });
  document.querySelectorAll(`[id^="${p}-"]`).forEach(el => {
    if (el.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') el.value = '';
    if (el.tagName === 'INPUT' && el.type === 'text') el.value = '';
    if (el.tagName === 'SELECT') el.value = '';
  });
  document.getElementById(p + '-scale').value = 50;
  moveThumb(p);
  document.getElementById(p + '-report').innerHTML = '';
  const prefix = p === 'r' ? 'r' : 'm';
  document.getElementById(prefix + '-items').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById(prefix + '-stopped').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById(p + '-live-summary').innerHTML =
    '<div class="live-summary-title">Summary of responses</div>' +
    '<div class="s-label" style="color:#888;font-size:0.84rem;">— Fill in the items above to see a summary —</div>';
}
</script>
```
